memory.cap_bytes.description: Byte cap for the memory-store inbox before promotion.

memory.backcapture_days.description: Max discovery window (days) for the back-capture sweep.

memory.backcapture_max.description: Per-sweep cap on sessions the back-capture sweep processes.

lessons.enforce.description: Whether lesson entries with an enforce block gate/warn at the tool call.

evaluator.cap_bytes.description: Byte cap for the evaluator inbox before aggregation.

evaluator.dashboard_sessions.description: How many recent sessions the dashboard trend windows to.

evaluator.dashboard_open.description: Auto-open the dashboard once per boot on SessionStart. Dashboard self-gating — read-only in the panel.

evaluator.dashboard_serve.description: Serve the dashboard via the local backend instead of a static file. Dashboard self-gating — read-only in the panel.

evaluator.dashboard_port.description: Port the dashboard server binds to.

evaluator.suggestions_top.description: How many open suggestions the Review pass ranks.

evaluator.implement_mode.description: How an implement job lands its commit.

evaluator.escalation_min_struggles.description: Struggles required before mid-session escalation fires.

evaluator.escalation_min_prompts.description: Prompts required before mid-session escalation fires.

evaluator.wiki_nav.description: Render the wiki sidebar nav in the dashboard.

evaluator.wiki_mermaid.description: Render mermaid diagrams in rendered wiki pages.

evaluator.toggle_ui.description: Render the Feature Toggles panel and expose its API routes. Dashboard self-gating — read-only in the panel.

skills.split_kb.description: Hard KB budget before a skill body is split.

skills.soft_kb.description: Soft KB budget warning threshold for a skill body.

skills.catalog_tok.description: Token budget for the always-loaded skill catalog.

skills.max_per_run.description: Max skills the daily maintenance pass will split per run.

skills.graduate_seen.description: `seen` count at which a lesson is flagged overdue to graduate.

skills.graduate_kb.description: Body size (KB) at which a lesson is flagged overdue to graduate.

team.merge.description: How team + personal content layers combine.

mcp.writes.description: Allow the MCP server to perform local toggle writes.

mcp.contribute.description: Allow the MCP server to invoke np-core-contribute.
